text:
The is one of several families that live within the Walls. It is the family where Oruo Bozad of the Special Operations Squad hailed from.

Story

Eve of the Counterattack arc

Oruo Bozad is first introduced as a member of the Levi Squad.

The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission arc

Oruo later participates in the 57th expedition outside the Walls where he is killed while battling the Female Titan.

When news about the Scout Regiment's return is heard, the Bozad family prepares dinner for Oruo in case he stops by home.
